title: The Dark Lord’s Dreadful Doughnuts
premise_summary: Evil doughnuts turn on their baker
cover_description: SHADOW buried under a giant pile of bouncing, gigantic doughnuts, arms flailing while SUNNY calmly nibbles one from inside a light fixture.
host_intro: Tonight, SHADOW bakes a treat to trap SUNNY. The treat has other plans.
host_outro: The doughnuts are still rising. SHADOW is hiding in the pantry.
script:
[TITLE: The Dark Lord’s Dreadful Doughnuts]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, SHADOW bakes a treat to trap SUNNY. The treat has other plans.]
[HOST_OUTRO: The doughnuts are still rising. SHADOW is hiding in the pantry.]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: young_sweet, mysterious_witch, musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: villain_fails]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: gentle, excited] Welcome, brave listeners, to the kitchen of doom.
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous, confident] I have crafted the stickiest, heaviest doughnuts in history.
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: deadpan, unbothered] Those look like normal doughnuts to me.

[BEAT_1]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Watch as they glue SUNNY to the floor forever.
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Why are they bouncing instead of sticking?
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] That’s… not supposed to happen. [STING: boing]

[BEAT_2]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: excited] Oh! They’re bouncing higher!
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: deadpan] I’m being launched into the ceiling.
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: panicked] No! My evil pastries are rebelling! [STING: whoosh]

[BEAT_3]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] I’m now stuck in the light fixture.
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: delighted] And the doughnuts are forming a pyramid!
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]I just got buried under my own doughnut avalanche![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: big_crash]

[BUTTON]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: unbothered] I’ll just eat my way out.
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: stunned] ...They’re delicious. [STING: deflation]

[COVER: SHADOW buried under a giant pile of bouncing, gigantic doughnuts, arms flailing while SUNNY calmly nibbles one from inside a light fixture.]
[PREMISE: Evil doughnuts turn on their baker]
